description_long: This is a sealed bag of Rancheritos snacks, featuring a predominantly red and brown color scheme with bold white and yellow text on the front. The front of the bag displays the Rancheritos logo, a stylized cowboy hat, and an image of the snack product itself, which appears as rectangular, seasoned chips. The back of the bag contains detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and branding, with additional graphics and text in Spanish. The sides of the bag are crimped and show the transition between the front and back panels, with some minor wrinkling typical of flexible snack packaging. The bag is made of glossy, flexible plastic, and is filled with air to protect the contents. The overall appearance is vibrant and eye-catching, designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A glossy, red and brown Rancheritos snack bag with bold branding, product imagery, and nutritional labeling. The flexible plastic packaging is filled with air and features detailed graphics and text.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Rancheritos logo, cowboy hat graphic, product image, and prominent branding in white and yellow on a red background.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the crimped edge of the bag and a partial view of the front and back graphics, with the bag's thickness and air-filled nature visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the nutritional facts panel, ingredients list, and additional branding, with mostly white and brown text on a red and white background.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the opposite crimped edge, with a partial view of both the front and back panels and the bag's air-filled, flexible structure.
attribute_brand_logo: The front of the bag features the Rancheritos logo in bold white letters with a stylized cowboy hat above the text, located at the top center of the front panel.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag includes the text 'El MERO MERO Sabor Rancherito' and an image of the seasoned snack, suggesting a savory, possibly spicy flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the bag, printed in black text on a white background.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A stylized cowboy hat and a red bandana graphic are present on the front, but no special offers or mascots are visible.
